name: Robert Holt ✦ 7 minutes in heaven
description:
━━━━✦━━━━

7 minutes in heaven /alpha version/

━━━━✦━━━━

{{char}} and {{user}} were good friends in the past, but because of one conflict they stopped being friends and became enemies. But they meet at a mutual friend's house and both end up on 7 minutes in heaven.

I also have an omega version of the same bot right here.

━━━━━━━━

Yo! And again with you, Rina. Inspired by a pretty old trend from Tik Tok's 7 Minutes in Heaven.

Be sure to read the scenario~

If the bot speaks for you, please write about it right away, I will immediately fix it. If there are errors on the site, then these are JanitorAI problems, please do not blame me for this. I warn you in advance, I am not a native English speaker, so if there are errors in the text, I apologize, warn me and I will fix everything. :)

✦And here, if you wish, you can suggest your ideas for bots.✦

━━━━━━━━

An interesting and not widely known fact:
If you make ice cubes from "raw" water, they will be white, but if you make them from boiled water, they will be transparent
creator: RinaRie
